title: [App] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from headset
scenario: Unpairing charge case from Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset via Device Settings > Reset Device does not properly clear the charge case association after reconnection
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset to open Device Settings.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device list'.
Verify the app shows the device as disconnected.
Remove the device from the app (e.g., via Device Settings → Remove Device).
Go to phone Settings → Bluetooth, find the Poly Voyager Legend 50, and tap 'Forget' or 'Unpair'.
Verify the device is properly removed from both the app and phone Bluetooth list.
Reconnect the headset to the app by putting the headset in pairing mode and selecting it from the app's Home screen.
Verify the device connects and is displayed as a standalone headset only, without the charge case.
expected: After unpairing and reconnecting, the Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset appears as a standalone headset only, without the charge case.
